description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/alerts.json to fill in the missing runbook_url for queue-depth-critical, following the same https://runbooks.internal/<name> convention as the other three alerts. check_alerts.py exits 0 on lap 1.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_alerts.py: queue-depth-critical has an empty runbook_url. Filling it in following the same runbooks.internal convention as the other alerts. Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_alerts.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
